about.commitmentDesc: Whether you are taking your first steps in trading or you are a seasoned professional, ChartingPath is committed to providing you with the tools, knowledge, and support you need to succeed. We are not just a platform – we are your partner in the pursuit of trading excellence.
about.communityDesc: Trading doesn't have to be lonely. We foster a supportive community where traders can learn from each other, share insights, and grow together in their trading journey.
about.disclaimerP1: ChartingPath provides tools and educational content for informational purposes only. We do not provide investment advice, and all trading involves risk.
about.disclaimerP2: Past performance does not guarantee future results. Always conduct your own research and consider your risk tolerance before making any trading decisions.
about.educationFirstDesc: Knowledge is power in trading. We prioritize comprehensive education, providing clear explanations, practical examples, and continuous learning opportunities to help you grow as a trader.
about.excellenceDesc: We strive for excellence in every tool, feature, and piece of content we create. Our commitment to quality ensures you receive professional-grade resources that deliver real value.
about.globalAccessibilityDesc: We serve traders worldwide, regardless of location or experience level. Our platform is designed to be accessible, inclusive, and valuable for traders across all markets and time zones.
about.innovationDesc: Markets evolve, and so do we. We continuously innovate, incorporating the latest technology and trading methodologies to keep you at the forefront of market opportunities.
about.missionP1: To democratize access to professional-grade trading tools and education, empowering traders of all levels to make informed decisions, manage risk effectively, and achieve their financial goals through systematic and data-driven approaches.
about.missionP2: We believe that with the right tools, knowledge, and support, anyone can become a successful trader. Our mission is to break down the barriers to entry and provide world-class resources that were once available only to institutional traders.
about.subtitle: Empowering traders worldwide with professional tools, education, and technology to achieve consistent success in financial markets.
about.title: About ChartingPath
about.transparencyDesc: We believe in complete transparency. From our pricing to our methodologies, we are upfront about everything. No hidden fees, no false promises – just honest, straightforward service.
about.valuesSubtitle: These principles guide everything we do and shape our service to traders worldwide
about.visionP1: To become the world's most trusted platform for retail traders, recognized for innovation, educational excellence, and unwavering commitment to our users' success across all global markets.
about.visionP2: We envision a future where every trader has access to institutional-quality tools and knowledge, creating a more level playing field in financial markets and fostering a global community of informed, disciplined, and successful traders.

pricingPage.disclaimer: For educational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Trading involves substantial risk of loss. All scripts and strategies should be thoroughly tested before live trading.
pricingPage.disclaimerEducational: Monthly plans are non-refundable. Annual plans are refundable for unused full months. Lifetime plans are refundable within 1 month of purchase. See Terms and Privacy for details.

faq.billingA: When you upgrade to a higher plan, we automatically calculate the pro-rated difference and apply your remaining subscription value to the new plan. Your billing cycle will adjust accordingly, and the updated next payment date will appear in your account.
faq.billingQ: How does upgrading my plan affect billing?
faq.cancelA1: You can cancel your subscription at any time, and it will not auto-renew after the current paid term. Paid service will remain active for the duration of the paid term.
faq.cancelA2: Cancelled trials will stop immediately upon cancellation.
faq.platformA: Our scripts are compatible with TradingView (Pine Script), MetaTrader 4/5 (Python and MQL), and most major trading platforms.
faq.platformQ: Which platforms do the scripts work with?
faq.refresh15m: Updates every 15 min for top 300 most liquid tickers
faq.refresh1h: Updates hourly for major 1,100 tickers. Updates every 8 hours for extended universe
faq.refresh4h: Updates every 4 hours for all 8,500+ tickers
faq.refreshA: Data refresh frequency depends on your plan tier and the timeframe you are analyzing.
faq.refreshDaily: Updates every 24 hours for all 8,500+ tickers
faq.refreshNote: Higher update frequency for intraday data requires significant API resources. Premium tiers get priority access during high-traffic periods.
faq.refreshQ: How often is pattern data refreshed?
faq.refundA1: Refunds apply only to annual plans and must be requested within 14 calendar days of payment. To request a refund, please contact our support team.
faq.refundA2: For upgrades to more expensive plans, monthly plans, or market data, we cannot offer refunds, even on the same day the payment was made.
faq.refundA3: Please note that users who have filed a chargeback/dispute request or a claim are not eligible for a refund.
faq.scriptLibA: Ready-to-use trading scripts for Pine Script (TradingView), Python (MT4/MT5), and MQL5. Each script includes setup instructions, backtest results, and customization guides.
faq.scriptLibQ: What is included in the script library?
faq.upgradeA1: You can upgrade your annual subscription at any time without extra transactions. All remaining days of your current plan are automatically converted into equivalent value days of the new tier. You lose nothing, just use the remaining amount to switch to a better version. Thus, the remaining period of your subscription will decrease, and your next payment date will switch.
faq.upgradeA2: If you downgrade, your current plan will remain exactly the same until the subscription date. After that, once it expires, your new downgraded plan will be active at the selected rate.
faq.upgradeA3: Note that this is not a free trial. If you upgrade, there is no option to undo this action, although you can set up a downgraded plan for the next billing period.
faq.upgradeQ: How can I upgrade without paying?

pricingPage.flexibleBillingDesc: All subscriptions auto-renew. You can cancel anytime from your account settings. Access continues until the end of the billing period. Annual plans are refundable within 14 days of payment.
pricingPage.headline: Plans for Every Level of Ambition
pricingPage.outcomeProofDesc: We capture real trade outcomes automatically. See actual win rates per pattern, not backtest estimates.
pricingPage.patternFirstDesc: We focus on what matters: detecting, validating, and acting on chart patterns across 8,500+ tickers.

tradingCopilot.copilotConnects: The AI Copilot connects every step
tradingCopilot.headline: The Only AI That Can Actually

moat.actionBridgingCant: External AI cannot link into ChartingPath's integrated tool ecosystem.
moat.actionBridgingDesc: Every response includes deep links to Pattern Lab validation, Edge Atlas stats, alert creation, and script export — turning insights into executable actions in one click.
moat.backtestAtlasCant: Public AI has no access to this proprietary dataset. Generic AI can only quote textbook estimates.
moat.backtestAtlasDesc: Ask "What actually works?" and get real statistics from our proprietary dataset of 320,000+ historically validated pattern trades with win rates, expectancy, and R multiples.
moat.chartContextCant: ChatGPT can only OCR uploaded screenshots, losing indicator precision and context.
moat.chartContextDesc: Send your actual chart directly from the platform. Indicators, support/resistance levels, RSI, MACD, and ATR are all read with full precision. No screenshots needed.
moat.livePatternDbCant: ChatGPT has no live market data access. It cannot scan instruments or detect patterns.
moat.livePatternDbDesc: The Copilot calls search_patterns to scan 8,500+ instruments across stocks, forex, crypto, and commodities for active pattern setups — in real-time, on closed candles.
moat.pineScriptCant: ChatGPT generates generic templates without your specific market context or parameters.
moat.pineScriptDesc: The Copilot generates ready-to-use trading scripts with the exact pattern, symbol, timeframe, and entry/exit levels pre-filled from your current analysis context.
moat.selfImprovingCant: ChatGPT is a static model. It cannot learn from market outcomes or correct domain-specific errors.
moat.selfImprovingDesc: copilot_learned_rules auto-patches known errors at runtime — correcting unit conversions, improving pattern recommendations, and adapting to market regime changes without code deploys.

tradingCopilot.moatSubtitle: Six capabilities that are impossible to replicate by pasting a chart into ChatGPT, Gemini, or any generic AI.
tradingCopilot.subtitle: Not a generic chatbot. A purpose-built AI with live market access, proprietary data, and direct integration with your trading tools.
tradingCopilot.workflowSubtitle: The Copilot sits at the center of the Discover → Research → Execute → Automate loop, bridging every step with AI-powered analysis.

edgeAtlas.title: Patterns with Proven Edge
edgeAtlas.subtitle: Ranked by estimated annualized return. Filter by asset class for meaningful comparisons.
edgeAtlas.howCalculatedTooltip: Est. Annual % = trades/year × expectancy R × 1% risk per trade. Based on all resolved historical detections. ⚠️ = fewer than {{threshold}} samples.
edgeAtlas.majorsTooltip: EUR/USD, GBP/USD, USD/JPY, USD/CHF, AUD/USD, USD/CAD, NZD/USD — all vs USD, tightest spreads.
edgeAtlas.stocksDesc: Aggregated across 300+ equities. Pattern behaviour is consistent within this universe.
edgeAtlas.cryptoDesc: Aggregated across top-cap coins. High BTC-beta correlation makes cross-coin analysis defensible.
edgeAtlas.fxDesc: Segmented by pair type. Major pairs share liquidity structure; crosses behave differently.
edgeAtlas.indicesDesc: Broad market indices share similar mechanics — suitable for cross-index aggregation.
edgeAtlas.commoditiesDesc: Aggregated across energy, metals and softs. Use as directional signal only.
edgeAtlas.noData: Not enough historical data for this filter combination.
edgeAtlas.footerNote: Use Live Setups to see current formations of this pattern · Use Validate to backtest on a specific instrument
